[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows multiple lines of large black text on a white background, with some lines arranged in two columns.

Main Subject:
The main focus is text reading “main,” “Main dimana?,” “Sama Kapan?,” and on the right side “apa?” and “siapa?” in a bold, sans-serif style.

Setting:
The background is plain white, with no visible objects or environment, and the image appears to be a cropped or zoomed view of typography.

Visual Details:
The text is black and varies slightly in size, with the left side containing multiple stacked lines (“main,” “Main dimana?,” “Sama Kapan?”) and the right side showing two lines near the top and middle (“apa?” and “siapa?”). The composition is simple, with ample white space and clear, high-contrast lettering. The camera angle is not applicable since this is a text-only graphic.

Visible Text:
main
Main dimana?
Sama Kapan?
apa?
siapa?

Practical Summary:
The image displays a typographic layout with Indonesian words and question forms arranged in two areas on a white background. It contains bold black text with “apa?” on the right and “main,” “Main dimana?,” and “Sama Kapan?” on the left.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
